message:
fix: wire last_insert_rowid() and changes() via cross-crate thread-locals

Thread-local storage in fsqlite-func now serves as the single source of
truth for last_insert_rowid and changes values. fsqlite-core sets these
during INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE execution, and the scalar functions in
fsqlite-func read them. Also captures rowid from VDBE engine after
StorageCursor-backed execution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
